overview: Nadimpalli Satyanarayana Raju Institute of Technology (NSRIT), also known as NS Raju Institute of Engineering and Technology, is a prominent private engineering institution established in 2008. Located in Sontyam, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, the campus is known for providing career-driven education and skill-based learning. Initially affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK), the college has successfully attained autonomous status, delivering multi-disciplinary engineering and management programs across an environment-friendly campus.
accreditation: Accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA); Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE); Rated AAA by Careers360 in 2024.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Programs (CSE, AI & ML, Data Science, ECE)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹43,000 – ₹55,000 per year. Total course fee ranges from ₹1.60 Lakhs to ₹1.72 Lakhs.
₹43,000 – ₹55,000 per year. Base tuition is supported by state fee reimbursement models.
₹35,000 per year. Total course fee is approximately ₹70,000.
₹50,000 per year. Total course fee is approximately ₹1,000,000.

placements.highestDomestic: ₹15.00 LPA (Historical Peak Highlighted in Select Drives)
placements.placementRate: Varies by department, reaching up to 80% – 90% in primary technical branches
placements.totalOffers: 612+ campus placements secured across different graduation batches
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, HCL, Intech, IBM, Deloitte
placements.internshipHighlights: Up to 80% of students in key technical streams secure operational training and corporate internships independently or through campus support

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are granted based on rank secured in state-level entrance examinations (AP EAPCET for B.Tech, AP ICET for MBA) followed by centralized counseling, alongside dedicated management quota options.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions adhere strictly to the schedule announced by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) and JNTUK guidelines.

campus.area: Environment-friendly campus situated on the Sontyam Highway
campus.specialNote: Hostel rooms feature regular maintenance, with access to gym facilities. Canteen and dining options provide basic, routine vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals.

hostelFees.StandardSharing: Varies seasonally; structured dynamically alongside mess and electrical utilities.

contact.address: N S Raju Institute of Technology (NSRIT), Sontyam, Pendurthi-Anandapuram Highway, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh – 531173, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Government-facilitated tuition fee reimbursement schemes applicable for eligible standard qualifiers.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Subject to state-defined ePASS eligibility benchmarks and criteria.
scholarships.partialWaiver: AP EAMCET/EAPCET category-admitted students receive ₹35,000 standard annual reimbursement, drastically minimizing their active payable tuition fee.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible state SC/ST/OBC/EWS students can seamlessly claim regulatory fee support programs via official channels.
